feed.title: Sagarmala Finance plans India's first blue bond issue
feed.summary: Sagarmala Finance Corporation is set to launch India's first blue bonds this fiscal year. The state-owned lender aims to raise up to ₹1,000 crore through this maiden issue. The corporation has a mandate to raise ₹25,000 crore.
